zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice de Courtenay於1160年9月18日出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布格時，她的父親Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay34歲，母親Isabelle de Courtenay33歲。她於1180年與Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她於1186年在法國被列為countess of angoloume。她去世於1218年2月12日在法國波特-哈倫斯享年57歲，埋葬在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利波特芝士。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice de Courtenay was born on 18 September 1160, in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, was 34 and her mother, Isabelle de Courtenay, was 33. She married Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême in 1180, in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1186, at the age of 26, her occupation is listed as countess of angoloume in France. She died on 12 February 1218, in Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice de Courtenay est née le 18 septembre 1160, à Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Courtenay, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême en 1180, à Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1186, à l’âge de 26 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est countess of angoloume à France. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1218, à Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England: Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice de Courtenay am 18. September 1160 in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay 34 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Courtenay 33. Sie hat 1180 in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1186, als sie 26 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als countess of angoloume in Frankreich aufgeführt. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1218 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Courtenay è nata il il 18 settembre 1160 nel Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Courtenay, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême nel 1180, nel Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1186, all'età di 26 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come countess of angoloume nel Francia. Morì il 12 febbraio 1218, nel Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Courtenayが1160年9月18日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Pierre Ier de France-Courtenayは34歳，母Isabelle de Courtenayは33歳であった。1180年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントアンゴウルeメでAymer Taillefer Count of Angoulêmeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1186年，26歳の時，フランスでの職業はcountess of angoloumeと記録されている。彼女は1218年2月12日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツで57歳で死去し，フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエンテ-マリティメポイトウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Courtenay(이)가 1160년 9월 18일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Courtenay(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1180년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 앤굴e에서 Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1186년, 26세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 프랑스에서 countess of angoloume이었다. 그녀는 1218년 2월 12일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처테-마이팀 포이토우에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Courtenay nasceu em 18 de setembro de 1160, em Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Courtenay, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême em 1180, em Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1186, com 26 anos, sua profissão aparece como countess of angoloume em França. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1218, em Poitou-Charentes, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice de Courtenay родилась 18 сентября 1160 г. в местности бургогн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Courtenay, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême в 1180 г. в местности ангоулeм, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1186 году, в возрасте 26 лет,  она работала по профессии countess of angoloume в местности Франция. Она умерла 12 февраля 1218 г. в местности поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности поитоу, чаренте-маритим, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice de Courtenay nació el 18 de septiembre de 1160, en Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Courtenay, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême en 1180, en Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1186, a la edad de 26 años, su ocupación registrada era countess of angoloume en Francia. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1218, en Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
